tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Laboratory results are largely within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly decreased total CO₂, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensated respiratory alkalosis, and low HDL cholesterol, which is a cardiovascular risk factor. Renal function, glycemic control, and lipid profile are otherwise unremarkable. Clinical correlation is recommended.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
